description.en: The first browser AI Agent extension to support Agent Skills, enabling AI to perform complex tasks through an expandable skill system. 🌟 Star if you like it! | 首个支持 Agent Skills 的浏览器 AI Agent 扩展，让 AI 通过可扩展技能系统执行复杂任务 🌟 如果喜欢请点个 Star！
description.cn: The first browser AI Agent extension to support Agent Skills, enabling AI to perform complex tasks through an expandable skill system. 🌟 Star if you like it! | 首个支持 Agent Skills 的浏览器 AI Agent 扩展，让 AI 通过可扩展技能系统执行复杂任务 🌟 如果喜欢请点个 Star！
